subject: SEO Update — ARLO — 2026-07-04
html:
PageWhat ChangedTarget KeywordCheck It
/connect/google-analytics-mcpNew connector landing page — how to connect GA4 to Claude via MCP, 3-step setup, 5 example prompts, real supported metrics/dimensions, FAQPage + HowTo schemagoogle analytics mcp (390/mo, KD 21, +39x YoY)askarlo.app/connect/google-analytics-mcp
/connect/google-ads-mcpNew connector landing page — how to connect Google Ads to Claude via MCP, same templategoogle ads mcp (590/mo, KD 18, +8x YoY)askarlo.app/connect/google-ads-mcp
/services/seo-specialist, /services/account-manager, /services/google-ads-specialistAdded internal links to the matching new connector page (fixes orphan-page risk for the new pages)supports the two pages aboveaskarlo.app/services/seo-specialist

Both pages build clean, pass lint, and are in the sitemap. This is the first pair of the planned connector-page matrix (the low-competition MCP-integration wedge). Next: Search Console MCP + Meta Ads MCP connector pages, then the AgencyAnalytics comparison page.
